[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10000000 1
1 11111010 6
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 10000110 3
5 00110001 3
6 01011010 4
7 10101010 4

01 10 10110111 6
12 21 01111011 6
23 32 11111010 6 match 1

56 65 10001011 4
67 76 11111010 6 match 1
70 07 11111110 7
